title: avena caryophyllea var. aggregata
intro: Avena caryophyllea var. aggregata, also known as oat-grass or oat-flower, is a subspecies of oat grass belonging to the Avena genus. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its soothing and calming properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Avena caryophyllea var. aggregata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
